name: ani-cli (allmanga.to)
description: Stream anime from allmanga.to using ani-cli's exact scraping logic. Supports sub and dub. Providers: wixmp, dropbox, wetransfer, sharepoint, gogoanime.
author: Community
notes: Direct port of ani-cli v4.8+ source. Uses api.allanime.day GraphQL API and the same hex decode table as ani-cli's provider_init function.
